steps.title: Set off the participial phrase
steps.content: The clause about the documentary exploring suffrage history is complete at century. Revealing then begins a participial phrase that explains the result or manner of that exploration, so it should be joined with a comma.

steps.title: Reject fragment punctuation
steps.content: A creates a sentence fragment beginning with Revealing. B uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause. D runs the participial phrase onto the clause without needed punctuation. The answer is C.
